reason: final_features_de.csv exists, but it does not contain f2_affective or the full German v4 F1-F7 matrix. Because F2 is unchanged in the Original and Improved specifications, both fitted models omit F2. The comparison is therefore a valid estimate of the robustness-change delta for F3/F4/F5, but not an exact F2-inclusive reproduction of the original notebook model.
